source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider an impedance \( Z = R + jX \) marked with point \( P \) in an impedance Smith chart as shown in the figure. The movement from point \( P \) along a constant resistance circle in the clockwise direction by an angle \( 45^\circ \) is equivalent to
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: adding an inductance in series with \( Z \)

choice_map.A: adding an inductance in series with \( Z \)
choice_map.B: adding a capacitance in series with \( Z \)
choice_map.C: adding an inductance in shunt across \( Z \)
choice_map.D: adding a capacitance in shunt across \( Z \)
